name: TalkPool AG
summary: TalkPool AG provides a range of network design, engineering, implementation, and managed services designs for telecommunications operators, system vendors, and prime contractors in Switzerland and internationally. It enables the Internet-of-Things (IoT) ecosystem by providing professional services and solutions comprising a comprehensive range of design, creation, and realization of IoT solutions and products. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Chur, Switzerland.
